name: pin_create
description: Create a new pin on a specified board with an image URL, title, description, and optional destination link.

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The ID of the board to save the pin to.

parameters.name: media_source
parameters.description: Media source object with source_type and url for the pin image.

parameters.name: description
parameters.example: A beautiful mountain landscape at sunset

parameters.name: link
parameters.description: Destination URL when the pin is clicked.

parameters.name: alt_text
parameters.description: Alt text for the pin image (max 500 characters).

parameters.name: board_section_id
parameters.description: The ID of the board section to save the pin to.

parameters.name: dominant_color
parameters.description: Hex color code for the pin's dominant color.
